name: Cai Gu
page_title: Cai Gu 蔡谷 [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Cai Gu, born in Chenliu, was cousin to Cai Yong. They served Dong Zhuo in Chang’an together in the early 190s. Concerned with their circumstances Cai Yong considered an escape to the east, but Cai Gu advised against the idea on grounds that Cai Yong was too well-known for the plan to succeed. (1)

(1): [CITE=RAFE:TOME]

full_text:
Cai Gu 蔡谷
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cai Gu (蔡谷)was born in Chenliu. Warned his cousin Cai Yong that fleeing Dong Zhuo would fail due to Yong’s fame. Cai Gu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Cai Gu, born in Chenliu, was cousin to Cai Yong. They served Dong Zhuo in Chang’an together in the early 190s. Concerned with their circumstances Cai Yong considered an escape to the east, but Cai Gu advised against the idea on grounds that Cai Yong was too well-known for the plan to succeed. (1)
